title: Java Fundamentals
description: Core Java syntax — variables, control flow, loops, methods.

lessons.title: Intro to Java
lessons.subtitle: Setup, syntax, first program
lessons.task: Print "Hello, Java!" to the console using System.out.println().
lessons.hint: The println() method prints a line of text followed by a newline.

lessons.title: Variables & Data Types
lessons.subtitle: int, String, boolean, casting
lessons.task: Declare an integer variable named score and assign it the value 100. Then print it using System.out.println().

lessons.title: Operators
lessons.subtitle: Arithmetic, comparison, logical
lessons.task: Compute and print the sum of a=7 and b=3.

lessons.title: Control Flow
lessons.subtitle: if, else, switch statements
lessons.task: Print "even" if n is divisible by 2, otherwise print "odd".

lessons.title: Loops & Iteration
lessons.subtitle: for, while, do-while
lessons.task: Print the numbers 1 to 5, one per line, using a for loop.

lessons.title: Methods
lessons.subtitle: Defining and calling functions
lessons.task: Implement the square method to return n * n.
